# Family history*Created: Sunday, December 4, 2016 at 1:09:24?PM*<div><span style="font-size: 23px">Family history</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 23px">Please tell them that you have a large family history of cancer and you want to get genetic testing and for your two daughters as well and that it was previously all ordered for you and you have the old kids, but they are expired so you need them to re-order the three kits and tell them about all of the family history in this note</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 23px">Leon</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 23px">Soft tissue sarcoma </span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 23px">Mom's grandma </span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 23px">Leukemia</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 23px">Mom's dad's side</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 23px">Diabetes</span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 23px">Heart attack </span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></div>

<div><span style="font-size: 23px">Heart attack </span></div>
<div><span style="font-size: 23px"><br></span></div>
